calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER CYNTHIA CHILDERS' Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate is DEEMED SUBMITTED. No appearances necessary. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558. (301/JLW)

Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-06-2005 Continued To Oct-20-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sylvia Courtney, Esq., 415-392-5040 for petitioner and moving party Cynthia Childers.
Lisa Berkowitz, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3825 for defendant and opposing party CCSF.

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court continued to 10/20/05 PETITIONER CYNTHIA CHILDERS' Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate. NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY. PARTIES TO SUBMIT PROPOSED STATEMENTS OF DECISION ON DISK. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558. (301/JLW/DM)

Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Continued To Oct-06-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER CYNTHIA CHILDERS' Hearing On First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate -- continued to October 6, 2005 on the Court's own motion. Moving party is to provide courtesy copies of their moving papers with a cover letter referencing the continued hearing date to Dept. 301 ASAP. (301/JLW) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558.

Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-07-2005 Continued To Sep-22-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
